Meaning.En: The ability to see; the faculty of sight.
Meaning.Example: Her vision improved after wearing the new glasses.

Situation.Vi: Bác sĩ kiểm tra thị lực cho bệnh nhân.
Situation.En: The doctor checks the patient's vision during a routine eye exam.

Meaning.En: A mental image of what the future will be like; a long-term goal or aspiration.
Meaning.Example: The company’s vision is to become a global leader in renewable energy.

Situation.Vi: CEO trình bày tầm nhìn chiến lược cho ban lãnh đạo.
Situation.En: The CEO presented the company’s five-year vision to the executive team.

Meaning.Vi: điều nhìn thấy (đặc biệt là điều kỳ lạ, linh ứng)
Meaning.En: A vivid mental image, especially one experienced in a dream, trance, or religious experience.
Meaning.Example: During the meditation, he had a vision of a glowing light.

Situation.Vi: Nhà tiên tri kể về thị kiến trong giấc mơ.
Situation.En: The prophet described the vision he saw in his dream to the crowd.
